case_title: EIGWADY,ABDELKADER A. VS HARVEY,JAMES "MANGER OF 57 TAYLOR" NEW GRAND APTS.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $300.00 FILED BY EIGWADY,ABDELKADER A. AS TO DEFENDANT HARVEY,JAMES "MANGER OF 57 TAYLOR" NEW GRAND APTS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-17-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO JAMES HARVEY RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EIGWADY,ABDELKADER A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARVEY,JAMES "MANGER OF 57 TAYLOR" NEW GRAND APTS. $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $320.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HARVEY,JAMES "MANGER OF 57 TAYLOR" NEW GRAND APTS.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $234.39 AS TO DEFENDANT HARVEY,JAMES "MANGER OF 57 TAYLOR" NEW GRAND APTS.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDMENT TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $120.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $5.00 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT HARVEY,JAMES "MANGER OF 57 TAYLOR" NEW GRAND APTS.
